def process_order(
    order,
    db_connection,
    logger,
    cache_client,
    metrics_collector,
    auth_service,
    email_sender,
    config,
    clock,
    rate_limiter,
):
    logger.info("Processing order %s", order["id"])
    metrics_collector.increment("orders.received")
    if not auth_service.verify(order["user_id"]):
        logger.warning("Auth failed for order %s", order["id"])
        return None
    if rate_limiter.is_limited(order["user_id"]):
        logger.warning("Rate limited")
        return None
    cached = cache_client.get(f"order:{order['id']}")
    if cached:
        return cached
    db_connection.begin()
    try:
        db_connection.execute("INSERT INTO orders ...", order)
        db_connection.commit()
    except Exception:
        db_connection.rollback()
        raise
    email_sender.send(order["email"], "Order confirmed")
    metrics_collector.increment("orders.completed")
    cache_client.set(f"order:{order['id']}", order, ttl=3600)
    return order
